seo.title: Contour Logo Boxes | Wholesale Sign Manufacturer | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale contour logo boxes and cloud logo signs. Custom-shaped illuminated enclosures for full-color logo reproduction. UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery for sign shops.

de.title: Kontur-Logo-Boxen | Großhandel Sign Manufacturer | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Großhandel contour Logo-Boxen and cloud logo signs. Custom-shaped illuminated enclosures for full-color logo reproduction. UL 48 listed, 3-Wochen delivery for Schilderwerkstätten.

data.subtitle: Custom-shaped illuminated enclosures that follow the exact contour of any logo. Combine the dimensional impact of channel letters with full-color logo reproduction for unmistakable brand presence.
data.image: Contour logo box — custom-shaped illuminated logo sign on building facade

de.subtitle: Custom-shaped illuminated enclosures that follow the exact contour of any logo. Combine the dimensional impact of Leuchtbuchstaben with full-color logo reproduction for unmistakable brand presence.

items.title: Brand-Perfect Shape
items.description: Every contour logo box is custom-shaped to follow the exact outline of your client's logo. The result is a three-dimensional sign that reinforces brand identity with unmistakable recognition from any distance.

items.title: Face-Lit & Halo-Lit Options
items.description: Choose from face-lit illumination for vibrant, full-color logo reproduction or halo-lit for a dramatic silhouette glow. Combination configurations are also available for maximum visual impact.

items.title: Full-Color Reproduction
items.description: High-resolution digital printing on translucent polycarbonate faces captures every gradient, color, and detail of the original logo artwork. PMS color matching ensures brand accuracy.

items.title: Dimensional Impact
items.description: Contour logo boxes combine the dimensional presence of channel letters with the full-color capability of cabinet signs. The custom-shaped enclosure creates a bold, sculptural presence on any facade.

items.title: Custom Finishes
items.description: Cabinet returns and trim are available in any standard or custom paint color, powder coat, or vinyl wrap finish. Match corporate brand standards with precision on every project.

items.title: UL 48 Listed
items.description: All illuminated contour logo boxes are UL 48 listed with proper labeling and documentation. Welded aluminum construction meets structural and electrical code requirements for commercial installations.

steps.title: Logo Artwork & Engineering
steps.description: Submit your client's logo artwork and our engineering team creates detailed CAD drawings of the custom-shaped cabinet, including structural calculations and electrical layouts — all at no extra cost.

steps.title: Custom Cabinet Fabrication
steps.description: CNC-cut aluminum panels are formed and welded to follow the exact contour of the logo. Returns are fabricated to the specified depth, creating a seamless three-dimensional enclosure.

steps.title: Face & Graphics Application
steps.description: Translucent polycarbonate or acrylic faces are contour-cut and fitted to the cabinet. Full-color digital graphics are applied for accurate logo reproduction with LED-friendly translucency.

steps.title: LED Installation & QC
steps.description: LED modules are installed for uniform face illumination or halo glow. Every unit undergoes powered illumination testing and full quality inspection before shipping fully assembled.

data.heading: Why Choose Contour Logo Boxes?
data.content:
Contour logo boxes — also called cloud logos or logo cabinets — are the ideal solution for businesses with recognizable logo marks that need dimensional, illuminated signage. Unlike channel letters, which represent individual characters, logo boxes reproduce the entire logo as a single illuminated unit.

This makes them especially popular for franchise signage, where brand consistency across multiple locations is critical. The custom-shaped cabinet follows every curve and angle of the logo, creating a sign that is instantly recognizable and impossible to replicate with standard sign products.
data.image: Contour logo box — detail of custom-shaped aluminum cabinet with full-color face

de.heading: Why Choose Kontur-Logo-Boxen?
de.content:
Kontur-Logo-Boxen — also called cloud logos or logo cabinets — are the ideal solution for businesses with recognizable logo marks that need dimensional, illuminated signage. Unlike Leuchtbuchstaben, which represent individual characters, Logo-Boxen reproduce the entire logo as a single illuminated unit.

This makes them especially popular for franchise signage, where brand consistency across multiple locations is critical. The custom-shaped cabinet follows every curve and angle of the logo, creating a sign that is instantly recognizable and impossible to replicate with standard sign products.

specs.label: Mounting
specs.value: Wall mount, raceway, pole mount, monument

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Contour logo boxes are ideal for any business with a recognizable logo mark that needs consistent, dimensional brand representation. From single locations to nationwide franchise rollouts, logo boxes deliver brand impact at scale.
